headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on General Mills, Lowers Price Target to $36
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains General Mills (NYSE:GIS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $41 to $36.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Defensive Stocks With Over 7% Dividend Yields
summary: During market turbulence, investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. Benzinga provides latest analyst ratings for high-yielding stocks in consumer staples sector.
